sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79059" key="parafulakismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραφῠλᾰκ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n79059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observation, surveillance</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς π. ἐλθεῖν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:3:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.31</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (v.l.<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">προπηλακ</itype>-).</sense> </entryFree>
